image:image.image:title: ToolsML - AI Tools Directory
image:image.image:caption: Discover and compare the best AI tools

image:image.image:title: Figma Screenshot
image:image.image:caption: Figma - The #1 collaborative design platform used by 4M+ designers. Browser-based UI/UX design, prototyping, and dev handoff.

image:image.image:title: Figma Logo
image:image.image:caption: Official Figma logo

image:image.image:title: Zapier Screenshot
image:image.image:caption: Zapier - Connect and automate workflows between 7000+ apps without coding.

image:image.image:title: Zapier Logo
image:image.image:caption: Official Zapier logo

image:image.image:title: ChatGPT Screenshot
image:image.image:caption: ChatGPT - Advanced conversational AI that can help with writing, coding, analysis, and creative tasks. Used by 200M+ users weekly.

image:image.image:title: ChatGPT Logo
image:image.image:caption: Official ChatGPT logo

image:image.image:title: ClickUp Screenshot
image:image.image:caption: ClickUp - All-in-one project management platform with AI-powered task automation and insights.

image:image.image:title: ClickUp Logo
image:image.image:caption: Official ClickUp logo

image:image.image:title: Wix ADI Screenshot
image:image.image:caption: Wix ADI - AI-powered website builder that creates custom sites based on your needs.

image:image.image:title: Wix ADI Logo
image:image.image:caption: Official Wix ADI logo

image:image.image:title: Loom Screenshot
image:image.image:caption: Loom - AI-enhanced screen recording and video messaging for async communication.

image:image.image:title: Loom Logo
image:image.image:caption: Official Loom logo

image:image.image:title: GitHub Copilot Screenshot
image:image.image:caption: GitHub Copilot - AI-powered code completion and chat that helps developers write better code 55% faster. Used by 1.8M+ developers.

image:image.image:title: GitHub Copilot Logo
image:image.image:caption: Official GitHub Copilot logo

image:image.image:title: Otter.ai Screenshot
image:image.image:caption: Otter.ai - AI-powered meeting transcription and note-taking with real-time collaboration features.

image:image.image:title: Otter.ai Logo
image:image.image:caption: Official Otter.ai logo

image:image.image:title: ElevenLabs Screenshot
image:image.image:caption: ElevenLabs - Industry-leading AI voice generation and cloning with 300+ ultra-realistic voices in 32 languages.

image:image.image:title: ElevenLabs Logo
image:image.image:caption: Official ElevenLabs logo

image:image.image:title: HubSpot Email Writer Screenshot
image:image.image:caption: HubSpot Email Writer - AI-powered email copywriting integrated with CRM and marketing automation.

image:image.image:title: HubSpot Email Writer Logo
image:image.image:caption: Official HubSpot Email Writer logo

image:image.image:title: Runway ML Screenshot
image:image.image:caption: Runway ML - Leading AI video generation and editing platform. Create and edit professional videos with Gen-3 Alpha text-to-video.

image:image.image:title: Runway ML Logo
image:image.image:caption: Official Runway ML logo

image:image.image:title: Midjourney Screenshot
image:image.image:caption: Midjourney - Create stunning, photorealistic and artistic images from text descriptions. The gold standard for AI image generation quality.

image:image.image:title: Midjourney Logo
image:image.image:caption: Official Midjourney logo

image:image.image:title: Descript Screenshot
image:image.image:caption: Descript - Edit video and audio by editing text — the simplest way to create podcasts, videos, and social clips.

image:image.image:title: Descript Logo
image:image.image:caption: Official Descript logo

image:image.image:title: Notion AI Screenshot
image:image.image:caption: Notion AI - AI-powered workspace for notes, docs, and project management. Used by 30M+ users at startups and enterprises.
